title: 12th Pass Jobs 2026 – Community Bank Coordinator
org: Community Bank Coordinator (Samudaya Vangi Orunginaipalar) – Temporary
applyMode: Offline only - in person or by Registered Post to DMMU, Sivaganga
shortInfo: TNSRLM Sivaganga Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 86 vacancies across Sivaganga. Candidates with 12TH Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 26-05-2026, and closes on 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through TNSRLM Sivaganga website, Sivaganga.nic.in.

basic_details.job_title: TNSRLM Sivaganga Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 86 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihood Mission Sivaganga
basic_details.post_name: Community Bank Coordinator (Samudaya Vangi Orunginaipalar) – Temporary
basic_details.application_mode: Offline only - in person or by Registered Post to DMMU, Sivaganga
basic_details.short_information: TNSRLM Sivaganga Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 86 vacancies across Sivaganga. Candidates with 12TH Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 26-05-2026, and closes on 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through TNSRLM Sivaganga website, Sivaganga.nic.in.

important_dates.exam_date: To be notified by District Selection Committee

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are not required to pay any fee at the time of application submission.

age_limit.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are not required to pay any fee at the time of application submission.

qualification.education_qualification: Must have passed 12th Standard (Class XII). Must be able to read, write and communicate well in both Tamil and English, and must have numerical/accounting skills. In hilly/tribal areas, if 12th pass candidates are not available, candidates with 10th Standard pass with other required qualifications may be considered with special permission from the District Collector.
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of application (29/05/2026). This recruitment is exclusively for women SHG members who are active members of SHGs operating under the respective Panchayat-level federations.

how_to_apply: Application letter clearly mentioning: Name, Date of Birth, Age, Gender, Educational Qualification, Residential Address, Mobile Number (without any errors)
Age proof - Aadhaar Card / PAN Card / Driving Licence
Two-Wheeler Driving Licence (Two-wheeler - if available; gives preference in selection)
important_instructions: This is a temporary post with a monthly honorarium of Rs. 2,500/- only. It is NOT a permanent or regular government job. No other service benefits are applicable.

Selected coordinators must perform all five duties listed (bank linkage, loan recovery, financial literacy, insurance, digital financial services, individual loan facilitation) for SHGs in their assigned Panchayat-level federations.
Candidates must own and operate an Android mobile phone and be capable of sending SMS and WhatsApp messages - this is a mandatory operational requirement for the role.
Preference in selection will be given to candidates who have computer skills AND possess a valid two-wheeler driving licence and can ride a two-wheeler.
Candidates must have communication skills and prior experience in completing banking transactions and loan applications for SHG members.
Applications must be submitted only by in-person delivery or Registered Post - applications received late for any reason will not be accepted.
The application box at the DMMU office is sealed - ensure you drop applications in person in the sealed box during office hours (10:00 AM to 5:00 PM) on Government working days.

In hilly/tribal areas, where 12th pass women SHG candidates are not available, 10th pass candidates with all other qualifications may be considered only with the special permission of the District Collector.

In Adi Dravidar (Scheduled Caste) residential areas in hilly regions, if the required female SHG member is not available, a male member may be selected with special permission from the District Collector.
Candidates belonging to the identified target population (BPL/marginalised) as per census records are given priority. If no such candidates apply, other eligible applicants will be considered.

click_here.text: Download TNSRLM Sivaganga Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for TNSRLM Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application is 29 May 2026 up to 5:00 PM. Applications received after this deadline will not be accepted.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in TNSRLM Sivaganga Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 86 Community Bank Coordinator vacancies have been announced across various Block Mission Management Units (BMMUs) in Sivaganga District.

faq.question: What is the qualification required for TNSRLM Community Bank Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 12th Standard (Class XII) and should possess basic communication and numerical skills. In special cases (hilly areas), 10th pass candidates may be considered.

faq.question: Who is eligible to apply for TNSRLM Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only women candidates who are active SHG members, with at least 2 years of SHG Promoter experience, and residing in the concerned Panchayat area are eligible.

faq.question: What is the salary for TNSRLM Community Bank Coordinator 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly honorarium of Rs. 2,500/-. This is a temporary position with no additional government benefits.

faq.question: What is the selection process for TNSRLM CBC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test (75 marks) followed by an Interview (25 marks), totaling 100 marks.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for TNSRLM Sivaganga Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: How can I apply for TNSRLM Community Bank Coordinator Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply offline by submitting their application in person or via Registered Post to the DMMU office in Sivaganga District.

faq.question: What documents are required for TNSRLM CBC application form 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants must submit 12th certificate, age proof (Aadhaar/PAN/DL), address proof, application letter, and optionally a two-wheeler driving licence.

faq.question: Is TNSRLM Community Bank Coordinator a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a temporary position under TNSRLM with a fixed honorarium and no permanent government job benefits.
